item.title: News
item.description: 龙川影狮-三下乡非遗文化探寻 8.2024 Interaction Design (Empowering Teenagers’ Sustainable Behavior) Workshop 6.2023 Southern University of Science and Technology Shuli College: Bianjing Lantern Making Workshop 12.2023 “Digital Innovation within Intangible Cultural Heritage” Seminar. 12.2023
